ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall skill rating of the player */,
  "potential_rating" INTEGER /* Potential skill rating of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field (e.g., PLAYER, GK) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "injury_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's current injury started */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract ends */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Current market value of the player in euros */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (left or right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is located */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the club's home stadium */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Current manager of the club */,
  "manager_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the current manager started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club associated with the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
